module:
Integration tests for service initialization and import sequences.

These tests verify that services initialize correctly regardless of
the order of initialization and import sequence, avoiding circular imports.

test_initialization_order_independence.docstring: Test that initialization order doesn't affect adapter registration.

test_import_sequence_stability.docstring: Test that import order doesn't cause circular import problems.

test_adapter_registration_completeness.docstring: Test that all expected adapters are registered.

test_adapter_bidirectional_availability.docstring: Test that adapters are available in both directions.

test_error_recovery_during_initializatio.docstring: Test recovery from errors during initialization.

test_lazy_loading_patterns.docstring: Test that lazy loading patterns work correctly with initializations.

test_registry_state_isolation.docstring: Test that registry state is properly isolated between tests.

test_embedding_system_initialization.docstring: Test initialization of the embedding system with other subsystems.
